text: What if animal organs could save human lives? Xenotransplantation is the transplantation of animal organs into humans. It sounds sci-fi, but science is making strides. Researchers are using gene editing to make organs from pigs more compatible, reducing rejection risks. Recent trials have shown promise, but uncertainties remain—like potential viral transmissions. So, while we’re close to breakthroughs, caution is key. Reliable solutions take time. Curious about the future of organ transplants? Like and follow for more insights!
